tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Verse]
[tab]             [ch]E[/ch]
I saw your sister at work[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Asus2[/ch]
I saw your mama at church[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]B[/ch]                         [ch]E[/ch]
I'm pretty sure I saw your car at the mall[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]E[/ch]
I see your face in the clouds[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Asus2[/ch]
I smell your perfume in crowds[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]B[/ch]                             [ch]E[/ch]
I swear your number's all my phone wants to call[/tab]

[tab]            [ch]C#m[/ch]              [ch]G#m[/ch]          [ch]Asus2[/ch]     [ch]E[/ch]
It's kinda funny how I can't seem to get away from you[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Asus2[/ch]       [ch]E[/ch]                [ch]B[/ch]
It's almost like you don't want me to[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]              [ch]E[/ch]                  [ch]Asus2[/ch]
You've got a cold heart and the cold hard truth[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]E[/ch]                      [ch]B[/ch]
I got a bottle of whiskey but I got no proof[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]C#m[/ch]            [ch]Asus2[/ch]
That you showed up tonight in that dress[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]E[/ch]   [ch]B[/ch]
Just to mess with my head[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]E[/ch]               [ch]Asus2[/ch]
So much for so long, out of sight, out of mind[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]E[/ch]                           [ch]B[/ch]
Girl you're lookin' so good, it's drivin' me out of mine[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]C#m[/ch]
Oh, you're breakin' my heart[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Asus2[/ch]                   [ch]E[/ch]
Baby, you're playin' hard to forget[/tab]

[Verse]
[tab]             [ch]E[/ch]
Told me to leave all your things[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Asus2[/ch]
Out on the porch on the swing[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]B[/ch]                          [ch]E[/ch]
You'd come and grab 'em by the end of the week[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]E[/ch]
Well, it's just some jeans and a shirt[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Asus2[/ch]
But it's a whole lot of hurt[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]B[/ch]                      [ch]E[/ch]
I think I know why you've been draggin' your feet[/tab]

[tab]          [ch]C#m[/ch]               [ch]G#m[/ch]         [ch]Asus2[/ch]     [ch]E[/ch]
Ain't it funny how I can't seem to get away from you[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Asus2[/ch]      [ch]E[/ch]                [ch]B[/ch]
It's almost like you don't want me to[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]              [ch]E[/ch]                  [ch]Asus2[/ch]
You've got a cold heart and the cold hard truth[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]E[/ch]                      [ch]B[/ch]
I got a bottle of whiskey but I got no proof[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]C#m[/ch]            [ch]Asus2[/ch]
That you showed up tonight in that dress[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]E[/ch]   [ch]B[/ch]
Just to mess with my head[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]E[/ch]               [ch]Asus2[/ch]
So much for so long, out of sight, out of mind[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]E[/ch]                           [ch]B[/ch]
Girl you're lookin' so good, it's drivin' me out of mine[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]C#m[/ch]
Oh, you're breakin' my heart[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Asus2[/ch]                   [ch]E[/ch]     [ch]B[/ch]
Baby, you're playin' hard to forget[/tab]


[tab]              [ch]E[/ch]                  [ch]Asus2[/ch]
You've got a cold heart and the cold hard truth[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]E[/ch]                      [ch]B[/ch]

[tab]                     [ch]C#m[/ch]            [ch]Asus2[/ch]

[tab]                       [ch]E[/ch]   [ch]B[/ch]

So much for so long, out of sight, out of mind[/tab]
